stemHtml: What are the most common weather conditions in tropical regions during the month of January?

options.a: Temperatures are high (> 18°C) and humidity is low.
options.b: Temperatures are high (> 18°C) and humidity is high.
options.c: Temperatures are low (< 18°C) and humidity is low.
options.d: Temperatures are low (< 18°C) and humidity is high.
